title: BOM → BOQ → Export
description: Every screen of pricing a job: build the BOM, open the BOQ, apply rates, export.

steps.title: Your bills of materials
steps.description: A BOM lists what the job needs.
steps.voiceScript: A bill of materials lists everything the job needs.
steps.captionText: A bill of materials lists everything the job needs.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your bills of materials: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Create a BOM
steps.description: Start from a building, floor or service template.
steps.voiceScript: Let us create one from a template.
steps.captionText: Let us create one from a template.
steps.fallbackMessage: Create a BOM: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Choose the template
steps.description: Five floor templates and fifteen services.
steps.voiceScript: Choose the building and the services this bill covers.
steps.captionText: Choose the building and the services this bill covers.
steps.fallbackMessage: Choose the template: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Create it
steps.description: The BOM opens with its sections ready for quantities.
steps.voiceScript: Create it, and the sections open ready for quantities.
steps.captionText: Create it, and the sections open ready for quantities.
steps.fallbackMessage: Create it: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Open the BOQ
steps.description: The BOQ nests under the BOM as bills and sections.
steps.voiceScript: The bill of quantities nests under the BOM as bills and sections.
steps.captionText: The bill of quantities nests under the BOM as bills and sections.
steps.fallbackMessage: Open the BOQ: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Compliance review
steps.description: Missing specs, units and suppliers, ranked by severity.
steps.voiceScript: The compliance review flags missing specifications before you quote.
steps.captionText: The compliance review flags missing specifications before you quote.
steps.fallbackMessage: Compliance review: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Export
steps.description: Excel and PDF exports are client-ready.
steps.voiceScript: Export the priced bill to Excel or PDF for your client.
steps.captionText: Export the priced bill to Excel or PDF for your client.
steps.fallbackMessage: Export: not visible on this screen yet.
